title: Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal: Which Option Actually Works for You: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You've poured your heart into writing your ebook, but the moment you try to sell it, you hit a roadblock: no one wants to accept your Nigerian Naira, and PayPal and Stripe are off-limits. You're not alone. Many creators in Nigeria face this same problem, watching their income dwindle as they're forced to seek out shady workarounds or abandon their entrepreneurial dreams altogether. The reality is harsh: without the right infrastructure, you're stuck in a cycle of frustration and missed opportunities. The question is, what do you do next?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip promise a quick fix, but they come with hefty fees and limited support for local currencies. Meanwhile, PayPal and Stripe are notoriously restrictive when it comes to Nigerian sellers, leaving you with a choice between giving up or settling for a subpar payment experience. But what about the alternatives? Unchained Commerce, for instance, offers a Full Stack Bundle that lets you sell ebooks without relying on any of these platforms. With its automated delivery system and wallet integration, you can focus on creating content, not navigating payment hurdles. But how do these options stack up when it comes to handling restricted countries?
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict rules about which countries they'll accept, and Nigeria is often on the list. Gumroad and Payhip are a little more lenient, but they still impose significant fees and limitations when dealing with non-standard currencies. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, has no such restrictions – you can sell to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about getting shut down. And with its integration with NOWPayments, you can accept payments in 300+ cryptocurrencies, giving you unparalleled flexibility in the market.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Gumroad and Payhip charge 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, and PayPal and Stripe are no better – their fees can add up quickly, eating into your hard-earned profits. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers a flat fee of $79.99 for the Full Stack Bundle, with no monthly subscription or hidden fees. And with NOWPayments, you can receive your payments instantly, without any intermediaries taking a cut. It's a simple, transparent model that lets you keep more of what you earn.
Unchained Commerce has no monthly subscription fees, so you can keep more of what you earn.

Automated delivery is a game-changer for ebook sellers, and Unchained Commerce has it in spades. With its Full Stack Bundle, you can set up a seamless delivery system that lets customers access your ebooks the moment they make a payment. No more manual uploads or tedious customer support – Unchained Commerce handles it all for you, freeing you up to focus on what matters most: creating great content.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're tired of dealing with restrictive payment platforms and want a straightforward, transparent solution, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. With its Full Stack Bundle and NOWPayments integration, you can sell ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about fees or limitations.
